urls.title: Meta’s “Name Tag” Face Recognition in Smart Glasses Sparks Civil-Society Pushback - WAYR TODAY
urls.description: Meta’s “Name Tag” feature for Ray-Ban and Oakley smart glasses would use the built-in AI assistant to surface info about people in view, as reported by WIRED after a Feb reveal by The New York Times. Internal plans ranged from matching only people the wearer is already connected to on Meta to recognizing anyone with a public Meta account (e.g., Instagram), but a civil-society coalition says face recognition in consumer eyewear “cannot be resolved” via design tweaks, opt-outs, or safeguards because bystanders can’t meaningfully consent.
